HomeWhy we exist
DownloadDownload

Your weekly meals
and groceries,
sorted in minutes.

Eat better effortlessly with the all-in-one app that finds recipes, plans meals and orders groceries from your favourite supermarket.

Download the appDownload the app

Products and prices from:

Dinner cheaper, healthier,
I-can’t-believe-how-easy-
that-was-ier.

How it works

1

Plan

We recommend recipes everyone will love with a menu tailored to each person’s dietary wants and needs.

3

Delivered

Your supermarket delivers all your weekly meals and groceries straight to your door, or, if you’d prefer, you can collect them in-store.

2

Shop

Every recipe ingredient is automatically added to your shopping basket, ready to buy at supermarket prices. Need toothpaste, tea bags or even a tin opener too? You can add them as well.

4

Cook

We make cooking from scratch a whole lot easier with easy-to-follow recipes and a community of fellow home cooks who are always on hand to help out.

1

Plan

We recommend recipes everyone will love with a menu tailored to each person’s dietary wants and needs.

2

Shop

We recommend recipes everyone will love with a menu tailored to each person’s dietary wants and needs.

3

Delivered

Your supermarket delivers all your weekly meals and groceries straight to your door, or, if you’d prefer, you can collect them in-store.

4

Cook

We make cooking from scratch a whole lot easier with easy-to-follow recipes and a community of fellow home cooks who are always on hand to help out.

Better for you

Eating healthily every day feels like an impossible task. That’s why we’re here to make eating better effortless. And delicious.  Obviously.

Better for your budget

All your groceries come at supermarket prices. What’s more, we’re cheaper than all those recipes boxes out there… *cough* less plastic sachets too *cough*.

Better for the planet

Our intelligent software helps minimise food waste by identifying if you have duplicate ingredients across recipes. It’s one small step for how we shop, one giant leap for not moving to Mars.

Why we exist

Questions? Fire away.

Is your 'spend less' range really 30% cheaper than a recipe box?

It sure is. Our Sainsbury's ‘Spend Less’ range of 70 extremely-delicious-even-if-we-say-so-ourselves recipes is at least 30% cheaper than the big recipe box companies’ value ranges. And if you only compare the amount of ingredients you actually use in the recipes, we’re nearly 50% cheaper.

To find the full details of our price comparison, just click here.

Is it just meals or the whole
grocery shop?

It’s the whole shebang. We partnered with Sainsbury’s to help make your big shop less of a big faff.

And it couldn’t be simpler. Once we’ve helped with your meal planning, it’s just a case of adding anything else you need to your basket. So now you can finally get your toilet rolls at the same time you get your Thai Summer Rolls.

Is it really free to use?

Yes – Cherrypick is completely free to use. Always. And – even better – you’ll find the exact same supermarket offers and prices that you’d find in-store. A good deal all round then.

Where do your recipes come from?

We have a dedicated team of super talented in-house, and guest chefs creating all new mouth-watering meals every week, to suit all lifestyle and dietary preferences. We also team up with BBC Good Food like some kind of delicious Batman & Robin.

Will Cherrypick help reduce  my waste?

Our recipes come with the full amounts of all the ingredients you need. So, rather than those pre-portioned, teeny, tiny plastic sachets you get with recipe boxes, we just give you the full bottle of soy, or packet of rice, for example.

And thanks to our clever software that lets you know when you have duplicate ingredients across recipes, we help you avoid buying more than you need. Waste not, need not, right?
